final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] cell_content;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            cell_content <= data_in;  // Write data to cell_content
        end
        data_out <= cell_content;      // Read data from cell_content
    end
endmodule
